nodes.label: Hotel Koral Morrocoy
nodes.source_file: Privado y Compartido/Núcleos del Proyecto/📁 Gestión de Proyecto 31f653cd415180fcbea1f6d2b6a6e732.md

attributes.rationale: Process inventory document for CCS Administration & Finance covering 6 areas: banking ops, supplier payments, tax obligations, accounting in Odoo, master data configuration, intercompany inventory updates

Process inventory for Purchases & Warehouse covering supplier creation (jurídico, natural, jurídico with natural bank account), product creation, quote comparison, document request, biweekly order review, reimbursement support, framework agreements

Current-state AS-IS document for Box/Register area of F&B. Covers 18+ tasks: guest list verification, breakfast service, cava management, requisition process, afternoon shift. Kitchen printer broken forces all print through register printer.
attributes.critical_issue: Kitchen printer broken; internet intermittency disrupts command flow

attributes.rationale: Current-state AS-IS for Legal Advisor covering 12 tasks: statute updates, vessel licenses, fire permits, INSASEL registration, marina reactivation. Rodrigo Gramcko is sole executor of all legal tasks with no formal document management system.
Current-state AS-IS for Hotel Admin Juan covering Phase 1: Billing in Purchases. Tasks include SENIAT document validation, exceptional purchase orders, order validation before import to invoice.

Current-state AS-IS for Controller covering 14 task groups: departmental supervision, operations monitoring, monthly financial analysis, results reporting, work plans, risk identification, cyclic inventory coordination, system inventory verification, inventory depuration, advisory services, audit coordination, fiscal audit, document organization, banking user admin, payment execution, inventory/accounting book downloads. Department currently inactive.
attributes.critical_issue: Retroactive modifications to closed periods making reports unreliable; Odoo parametrization errors

attributes.rationale: Current-state AS-IS for Purchases & Warehouse. Victor Pérez manages warehouse. Flow: Victor counts → Sr. Alberto (GG) approves → communicates to Compras via WhatsApp → orders placed → Victor receives & validates against Odoo → enters in Odoo → notifies Compras. Sr. Alberto orders on weekends disrupting price comparison.
attributes.critical_issue: Sr. Alberto orders on weekends disrupting price comparison and days off

attributes.rationale: Current-state AS-IS for Kitchen covering all meal phases (breakfast 1.1-1.5, lunch 2.1-2.5, snacks 3.1-3.4, requisitions 4.1-4.6, dinner 5.1-5.4, cleaning 6.1-6.3, protein processing 7.1-7.5). Requisition flow: format → Gerencia Operaciones sign → Almacén delivers & signs.

Current-state AS-IS for Operations covering pool tasks, landscaping, maintenance requests, electrical tasks, water tank, gasoil tank, gas tank, well/water pump, sewage pumps. Richard doesn't use Odoo; no admin assistant; communication bottleneck.
attributes.critical_issue: Richard doesn't use Odoo; no admin assistant; communication bottleneck

attributes.rationale: Current-state AS-IS for HR covering parafiscal documentation (IVSS, INCES, FAOV, MPPPST): monthly portal review, solvency downloads, payment commitment reporting.

Current-state AS-IS for Bar/Service area covering all meal phases. Tablets cannot send orders directly to kitchen due to network problems; manual paper comandas used as workaround. Key desire: mesoneros tablet to kitchen directly, freeing caja for billing only.
attributes.critical_issue: Tablets cannot send orders directly to kitchen due to network problems

attributes.rationale: Current-state AS-IS for Hotel Admin Libny covering Phase 1: Daily cash register closes. Tasks include bank payment verification via portal, Cloudbeds xlsx activity report export and validation. Libny has sole access to banking portals.
attributes.critical_issue: Single point of failure: Libny sole access to banking portals

attributes.rationale: Current-state AS-IS for CCS Admin covering banking operations (daily availability, payment planning, rate monitoring, POS tracking, account openings) and supplier payments (platform payments, retention reimbursements, urgent purchases, fuel/rent payments). Communication risk via personal WhatsApp instead of corporate channels.
attributes.critical_issue: Communication via personal WhatsApp instead of corporate channels

attributes.rationale: Current-state AS-IS for Hotel Management covering check-in process (walk-in and reservation-based) and guest data registration in Cloudbeds. Special cases: institutional reservations (no charge), Family & Friends (special rate from Rafael), Venetur alliance guests.

nodes.label: KM-MIN-002: Gerencia Hotelera (A y B) - Sesión 1

attributes.rationale: Meeting minutes March 25, 2026 between Rodrigo Gramcko, Adriana Montes, Douglas for F&B process lifting. Covers all meal phases, inventory, digitalization needs. Key finding: need for mesonero-to-kitchen direct tablet ordering. Standard inventory for 50 persons. 2 tablets available, need at least 1 more.

Meeting minutes March 26, 2026 with Juan Herrera covering purchase billing and biweekly fiscal close. Key data: 56 invoices per biweekly close, ~500 bank movements monthly, 25 open orders in Compras vs 18 in CxP. Payment maturity trend: 2023=0% with invoice, 2024=60%, 2025=90% with invoice.

Meeting minutes March 17, 2026 with Rodrigo, Juan, Libni covering admin process lifting: occupancy reports for Venetur/Inatur (critical), bank reconciliation, inventory management, rental/lease invoicing, platform management (Odoo, Cloudways, Poster), manual formats, parking closes, technology integration. Parking rates: 5€ small, 10€ medium, 20€ bus.
Central ERP system used across all departments at Koral Morrocoy for invoicing, inventory, purchasing, accounting, and reconciliation. Multiple parametrization errors identified.
attributes.known_issues: parametrization errors; retroactive modifications to closed periods

attributes.rationale: Property Management System used for hotel guest management, check-in, occupancy reports. Used by Libny and Gerencia Hotelera.
Point of Sale system used for F&B order management (comandas). Caja uses Poster to receive and process orders. Menu synchronization with Poster evaluated to avoid price errors.
Hosting/cloud platform managed by Adriana. Used for product creation distinct from Odoo and Poster.

Primary communication channel used across departments: guest lists to F&B, purchase approvals from GG, supplier invoice requests, payment confirmations. Mix of personal and corporate accounts creates governance risk.
Used as parallel control tool for bank reconciliation (marking reconciled movements), occupancy reporting to Venetur/Inatur, and various manual tracking. Parallel to Odoo rather than integrated.
Project lead conducting AS-IS lifting sessions and process analysis across all departments. Also sole executor of all legal advisory tasks.
Finance manager at CCS. Responsible for banking operations, payment authorizations, and financial oversight. One of the required approvers for payments.
Administrative assistant at Hotel. Handles purchase billing (Phase 1 AS-IS), invoice validation per SENIAT, biweekly fiscal close coordination. Key informant in KM-MIN-001 session.

Administrative assistant at Hotel. Handles daily cash close, bank portal verification (sole access), Cloudbeds report export, rental invoicing, Poster and Odoo product creation, manual format design. Critical single point of failure for banking access.
Administrative assistant at CCS. Works alongside Erika in banking operations and supplier payment tasks.

Controller manager. Department currently inactive. Responsible for 14 task groups spanning financial supervision, cyclic inventory coordination, audit coordination, banking user admin. Identified Odoo parametrization errors as critical issue.
HR manager. Responsible for parafiscal documentation management (IVSS, INCES, FAOV, MPPPST). Works with Marilyn (HR Analyst).
Warehouse manager. Performs physical inventory counts, receives and validates deliveries against Odoo, enters receipts in Odoo, notifies Compras. Central node in procurement flow.
Service captain in F&B. Key informant in KM-MIN-002. Oversees mesonero operations, guard handover, requisition process. Advocates for direct tablet-to-kitchen order flow.
Kitchen head chef. Responsible for all kitchen phases (breakfast, lunch, snacks, dinner, cleaning, protein processing). Coordinates requisitions through Gerencia Operaciones.

Operations manager. Does not use Odoo. No admin assistant assigned. Creates communication bottleneck because all maintenance requests and operational decisions pass through him without digital tracking.
attributes.critical_issue: Does not use Odoo; no admin assistant; communication bottleneck

attributes.rationale: Hotel operations supervisor/hotel management. Manages physical inventory supervision for reception stores, Cloudways product creation, signs requisitions, and participates in KM-MIN-002 F&B process lifting.
Operating company for Koral Morrocoy hotel. All internal administrative, financial, and operational processes documented in the AS-IS files are under SERAC.

Venezuelan state tourism entity requiring daily occupancy and income reports from the hotel. Creates work duplication by requiring multiple formats for the same data. Hotel has an alliance arrangement with Venetur guests.
Venezuelan national tourism institute also receiving daily occupancy reports. Parallel regulatory recipient alongside Venetur.

Venezuelan tax authority. Invoices must comply with SENIAT requirements: RIC, fiscal address, invoice number, control number, date, letterhead, legibility. All billing processes validated against SENIAT standards.

Biweekly fiscal close performed on the 15th and last day of each month. Consolidates all invoices (open, closed, pending), reconciliations, errors, and information requests. 56 invoices per close period, ~500 bank movements monthly. Key compliance checkpoint.

Cyclic inventory process coordinated by Controller (Meche) to validate physical stock against Odoo system records. Also referenced in Purchases & Warehouse AS-IS. Used to detect discrepancies and depurate obsolete inventory records.

nodes.label: Proceso de Comandas (Orden de Pedido F&B)

attributes.rationale: F&B order flow: Mesonero takes order on paper → delivers to Caja → Caja enters in Poster → sends to kitchen. Critical bottleneck: kitchen printer broken so all orders print through Caja printer. Desired future state: mesonero tablet → kitchen directly via Poster.

Requisition flow used by Kitchen and Bar: department fills manual format → Gerencia Operaciones signs → Almacén receives request → delivers products → signs comprobante. If almacén lacks stock, Compras is notified to purchase.

Purchase billing process: solicitud → pedido (compras) → validación SENIAT → conversión monetaria (USD/VES) → registro Odoo → solicitud pago finanzas → autorización gerencia → comprobante proveedor → conciliación bancaria. 2025: 90% payments with prior invoice vs 0% in 2023.

Bank reconciliation performed by Libny (hotel) and Erika/Joseline (CCS). Covers Banesco, Banplus, Banco Exterior and USD platforms (PayPal, Binance, Zelle). Ideally weekly, monthly close in first 5 days. ~500 monthly movements distributed among several responsible parties.

Hotel check-in covering walk-in and reservation-based arrivals. Guest data registered in Cloudbeds. Special cases: institutional (no charge), Family & Friends (Rafael special rate), Venetur alliance guests. BCV exchange rate used for USD conversion.

Daily occupancy and income report sent to Venetur and Inatur. Data extracted from Odoo (P&L report) and Cloudbeds (guest report). Submitted via email and WhatsApp between midnight and 1am during high season. Venetur requests duplicate formats causing work redundancy. Automation opportunity identified.

Procurement flow: Victor (almacén) counts stock → presents to Sr. Alberto (GG) → GG approves via WhatsApp to Compras → Compras places order with supplier → Victor receives and validates against Odoo → enters receipt in Odoo → notifies Compras. Weekend ordering by GG disrupts weekday processes.
attributes.flow: almacen_count → GG_approval → compras_order → almacen_receive → odoo_entry → compras_notify

attributes.rationale: Mandatory regulatory document for regulated food products (oils, flours, groceries). Must be validated on Sunagro portal same day as receipt to avoid fines. Must match invoice and warehouse receipt.

Payments made to suppliers before invoice is issued. Tracked in pending folders. 10% of payments in 2025 are still anticipos. Requires reconciliation when invoice arrives. Cases include equipment loans and advance payments to musicians.

Daily parking register managed by security guard. Rates: 5 EUR small vehicle, 10 EUR medium, 20 EUR bus. Security head provides income report to Libny for invoicing. Daily cash close with electronic payment validation.

attributes.rationale: KM-MIN-001 session with Juan Herrera directly documents the processes captured in AS-IS Administración y Finanzas Hotel (Juan)
KM-MIN-001 session with Libny directly documents the processes captured in AS-IS Administración y Finanzas Hotel (Libny)
KM-MIN-002 session with Adriana and Douglas directly documents the bar/service processes in AS-IS Inventario A y B (Bar)
KM-MIN-002 covers F&B operations including kitchen interface (comanda delivery to cocina), making it indirectly reference kitchen processes
The process inventory document for CCS Admin preceded and informed the AS-IS document for the same department
The process inventory for Purchases & Warehouse preceded and informed the AS-IS document for the same department
Juan Herrera is explicitly named as the responsible party for all processes in the AS-IS Hotel Admin (Juan) document
Libny is explicitly named as the sole responsible party for all tasks in AS-IS Hotel Admin (Libny)
Rodrigo Gramcko is the sole executor of all 12 legal advisory tasks documented in AS-IS Asesor Legal
Meche is named as the Controller manager responsible for all tasks in AS-IS Contraloría, though department is currently inactive
Victor Pérez is explicitly named as warehouse manager central to all warehouse tasks in AS-IS Compras y Almacén
Emil is named as kitchen head chef responsible for all kitchen phases in AS-IS Cocina
Richard is named as operations manager responsible for all tasks in AS-IS Operaciones
Douglas is named as service captain responsible for bar/service operations in AS-IS Bar
Erika is named as finance manager responsible for CCS banking operations and supplier payments in AS-IS Admin CCS
Adriana Montes is named as hotel management supervisor responsible for check-in and guest management processes
Andry García is named as HR manager responsible for parafiscal documentation tasks in AS-IS Talento Humano
The comanda/order process uses Poster POS as the system through which orders are entered by Caja and sent to kitchen
The comanda process is detailed across multiple tasks in AS-IS Caja covering order receipt, printing, and kitchen routing
The comanda process is also documented from the mesonero/bar perspective in AS-IS Bar, showing the manual paper workaround
Requisition process for insumos is detailed in Phase 4 (tasks 4.1-4.6) of AS-IS Cocina
Requisition process is also documented in Phase 4 (tasks 4.1-4.5) of AS-IS Bar/Servicio
When almacén has no stock for a requisition, it triggers a purchase request through the Compras workflow documented in AS-IS Compras y Almacén
The biweekly fiscal close consolidates all purchase billing activity from the 15-day period, including 56 invoices per close
Bank reconciliation feeds into and is consolidated by the biweekly fiscal close process
The biweekly fiscal close is a key process documented in Juan's AS-IS document
Bank reconciliation is performed and recorded in Odoo, with Excel as parallel control tool
Excel serves as parallel control for marking reconciled bank movements alongside Odoo
Cloudbeds provides the guest occupancy report (informe de hospedados) used to build the daily Venetur/Inatur report
Odoo provides the P&L report (informe de ganancias y pérdidas) used to build the daily income portion of the Venetur/Inatur report
Daily occupancy and income report is sent to Venetur by email and WhatsApp between midnight and 1am
Daily occupancy and income report is also sent to Inatur alongside Venetur
All purchase invoices must comply with SENIAT requirements (RIC, fiscal address, invoice number, control number, date, letterhead, legibility)
Sunagro guide validation is explicitly referenced as part of the purchase billing process in Juan's AS-IS and meeting minutes
Cyclic inventory is explicitly documented in Controller AS-IS tasks 3.1, 3.2, and 3.3 as a core Controller responsibility
Cyclic inventory is also documented in Compras y Almacén AS-IS as it involves Victor Pérez and the warehouse
Victor Pérez is the central actor in the procurement flow, performing initial count, receiving orders, and entering in Odoo
Victor validates and enters all warehouse receipts in Odoo as part of the procurement flow
SERAC (operating company) uses Odoo as its central ERP system across all departments
Hotel check-in process requires guest data registration in Cloudbeds PMS
Libny exports daily activity reports from Cloudbeds as part of the cash close process
Libny receives the parking income report from security and processes the daily invoicing
The AS-IS document provides operational-level detail for the same processes listed in the CCS Admin process inventory
The AS-IS document provides operational-level detail for the same processes listed in the Compras & Almacén process inventory
WhatsApp is the channel through which GG (Sr. Alberto) communicates purchase approvals to Compras, making it essential to the procurement flow
WhatsApp is used alongside email to ensure daily Venetur/Inatur report delivery confirmation
Advance payments (10% of 2025 payments) represent the exception case in the purchase billing process where payment precedes invoice

Both AS-IS documents document the same F&B service operation (caja and bar/mesonero) from complementary perspectives; both identify the same core bottleneck (broken kitchen printer, network issues) and the same desired digitalization (tablet direct to kitchen)

Both documents cover hotel administration processes (billing vs. cash close/reconciliation) executed by two different assistants who share the same department. Both feed into the same biweekly close and banking reconciliation cycles.

CCS Admin and Hotel Admin (Juan) both address the financial flow of supplier payments and invoice processing within the same company. CCS handles payment execution; Hotel handles invoice registration. Both use Odoo and require SENIAT compliance.

Both processes solve the same problem of supply replenishment: the requisition process handles internal department-to-warehouse requests, while the procurement flow handles warehouse-to-supplier ordering. They are sequential phases of the same material flow.

Kitchen receives comandas from Bar/Caja and sends prepared food back. Both documents describe two sides of the same service transaction. Kitchen also shares requisition data with Bar through the Almacén.
Controller (Meche) supervises CCS Administration including banking operations and financial reporting as part of departmental supervision task 1.1
Controller also supervises hotel administration financial processes as part of its departmental supervision scope
Rodrigo Gramcko conducted and authored the KM-MIN-001 meeting minutes session with Juan Herrera
Rodrigo Gramcko conducted and authored the KM-MIN-001 session with Libny
Rodrigo Gramcko conducted and authored the KM-MIN-002 session with Adriana and Douglas
Operations AS-IS explicitly notes Richard does not use Odoo, making Operations department a gap in the company's digital integration
HR parafiscal documentation (IVSS, INCES, FAOV) may intersect with Venetur compliance requirements but direct connection is not confirmed in the partial read of the HR AS-IS document
Libny creates and manages products in Poster POS system alongside Odoo, as stated in KM-MIN-001 Admin Libny and AS-IS Hotel Libny

attributes.rationale: Kitchen, Bar/Service, and Caja together constitute the complete F&B service operation at Koral Morrocoy. They share a single broken printer bottleneck, the same comanda flow, the same requisition path to Almacén, and the same goal of digitalizing orders via Poster on tablets. No pairwise edge fully captures this three-way operational dependency.

The biweekly fiscal close, purchase billing process, bank reconciliation, and Odoo together form a single compliance cycle that cannot be described pairwise: the close triggers reconciliation, reconciliation validates billing, billing is registered in Odoo, and Odoo feeds the close report. The four-way relationship adds information beyond any pairwise combination.

Libny acts as the sole human integration point between Cloudbeds (guest data) and Odoo (financial data), combining both to produce the Venetur/Inatur daily report. This four-node hub is a single point of failure: if Libny is unavailable, the mandatory regulatory reporting chain breaks entirely. The group relationship adds risk context beyond pairwise edges.
